seoTitle: How to Create an Epic Template in Jira Cloud
metaDescription: Set up a reusable epic template in Jira Cloud so every new initiative starts with the same structure and fields already in place.
intro: If your team creates similar epics over and over, rebuilding the same fields and structure each time wastes effort. A template solves that by giving you a consistent starting point. Here's how to set one up in Jira Cloud.

steps.heading: Build a sample epic first
steps.body: Create an epic with the fields, description structure, and any standard child issues you want repeated in future epics.

steps.heading: Save it as a reusable base
steps.body: Depending on your setup, use Jira's issue templates feature or a dedicated app to save the epic's structure as a template.

steps.heading: Define default fields
steps.body: Pre-fill fields like labels, components, or description sections that should stay consistent across every epic created from the template.

steps.heading: Make the template accessible to your team
steps.body: Share or publish the template so other project members can use it when starting a new epic.

steps.heading: Create new epics from the template
steps.body: When starting a new initiative, apply the template instead of building the epic from scratch.

faq.question: Does Jira Cloud have built-in epic templates?
faq.answer: Jira Cloud offers issue templates through certain apps or forms features; native templating varies by plan and marketplace apps.

faq.question: Can I include subtasks or child issues in a template?
faq.answer: Depending on the templating method used, some tools allow a set of standard child issues to be created alongside the epic.

faq.question: Will editing a template change existing epics?
faq.answer: No, updating a template only affects epics created afterward, not ones already built from an earlier version.

faq.question: Is there a cost to using epic templates?
faq.answer: Native fields can be reused for free, but more advanced templating apps may require a paid marketplace subscription.
